reviews.comment:
Eramos 3 autos en la cola, 45 minutos esperando a que avance la fila. Ojalá tuvieran mas de 1 persona atendiendo

(Translated by Google)
There were three cars in line, and we waited 45 minutes for the line to move. I wish they had more than one person working.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención y eso que había un solo playero las 12 de la noche del sábado 6 de noviembre, el pibe se esmeraba por atender y sobre todo rápido

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, especially considering there was only one attendant at midnight on Saturday, November 6th. The guy went out of his way to help, and above all, he was quick.

reviews.comment:
Todo muy limpio y ordenado lastima la falta de colaboracion entre empleados. Se demora mucho la atencion al cliente

(Translated by Google)
Everything was very clean and tidy, it's a shame there was a lack of cooperation among the employees. Customer service is very slow.

reviews.comment:
Yo  compro  en  el  local....es  personal  muy  amable  y  con  excelente  trato  tanto  las  empleadas  como  los  empleados...no  tienen  nunca  mal  trato  hacia  los  clientes...no  importa  lo  que uno  compre.....merecen  se  reconocidos..
No  ocurre  lo  mismo  en  otras  YPF...

(Translated by Google)
I shop at this station...the staff is very friendly and provides excellent service, both the employees and staff...they never treat customers badly...no matter what you buy...they deserve recognition. The same cannot be said for other YPF stations...
